name: Charminar
description: Iconic old city monument with markets and classic Hyderabad street life nearby.

name: Golconda Fort
description: Large fort complex with views, stories of the Qutb Shahi rulers, and evening light shows.

name: Salar Jung Museum
description: Major museum with art, clocks, manuscripts, and collections from across the world.

name: Chowmahalla Palace
description: Restored palace complex that shows the royal side of Hyderabad's Nizam era.

name: Paradise Biryani
description: Popular stop for Hyderabadi biryani and quick local meals.

name: Cafe Niloufer
description: Known for Irani chai, Osmania biscuits, and casual snacks.

name: Laad Bazaar
description: Old city bazaar for bangles, pearls, textiles, and souvenirs.

name: Hussain Sagar Lake
description: Lakeside promenade for an easy evening walk and city views.
